---
title: "Figure5_IWG"
author: "Elizabeth Campbell"
date: "2026-02-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#===============================================================================
# PANEL C: Geographic Map of Top SNP (FIXED)
#===============================================================================

cat("Creating Figure 5C (Geographic map)...\n")

top_snp <- bio15_plot %>% slice_min(P, n = 1) %>% pull(SNP)
cat("  Top SNP:", top_snp, "\n")

# Load genotype - DON'T transpose, it's already samples × SNPs
M <- fread(file = file.path(GENO_DIR, "IWG_numeric_genotype_3.csv"), 
           sep = '\t', skip = 1)

# First column is sample IDs, rest are SNP genotypes
sample_ids <- M[[1]]
M <- as.matrix(M[, -1])
rownames(M) <- sample_ids

cat("Matrix dimensions:", nrow(M), "samples ×", ncol(M), "SNPs\n")
cat("Top SNP exists?", top_snp %in% colnames(M), "\n")

# Load geography
pheno <- fread(file = file.path(PHENO_DIR, "IWG_bioclim.csv"))

# Clean IDs
clean <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^a-z0-9]", "", trimws(as.character(x))))
rownames(M) <- clean(rownames(M))
pheno$id <- clean(pheno$PI_Accession)

# Extract genotypes for top SNP
top_snp_genos <- M[, top_snp]
names(top_snp_genos) <- rownames(M)

# Merge with geography
geo <- pheno %>%
  filter(!is.na(Longitude), !is.na(Latitude)) %>%
  mutate(
    genotype = top_snp_genos[id],
    geno_class = factor(genotype, levels = 0:2, 
                       labels = c("Ref/Ref (=0)", "Ref/Alt (=1)", "Alt/Alt (=2)"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(genotype))

cat("Samples with genotype data:", nrow(geo), "\n")

# Make map
world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world, fill = "tan", color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.2) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-10, 135), ylim = c(25, 65)) +
  geom_point(data = geo, aes(Longitude, Latitude, fill = geno_class),
             shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("blue", "yellow", "red"), name = "Genotype") +
  labs(title = sprintf("%s (p = %.2e)", top_snp, min(bio15_plot$P)),
       x = "Longitude (°E)", y = "Latitude (°N)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "lightblue", color = NA))

ggsave(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "Figure_5C_Geographic.png"), p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

cat("  Saved: Figure_5C_Geographic.png\n\n")
cat("DONE!\n")
```
